
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yin Metal Rooster|kanji=ŤĺõťÖČ|romaji=kanoto tori|onyomi=shinyŇę|p=xńęy«íu|w=hsin-yu|mi=…ēin‚ĀĶ¬≥ iŐĮ…§ äŐĮ¬≤¬Ļ|y=san1 jau5|j=san1 jau5|ci=s…źn j…źu|mc=sin j…®u|oc-bs=sin j…Į Ē|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yin Metal Rooster also known as  Yin Metal Rooster''' ({{ill|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|ŤĺõťÖČ|ja|1=Yin Metal Rooster|2=ja|ŤĺõťÖČ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/ŤĺõťÖČ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/1=Yin Metal Rooster|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rooster|qq=}}) is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 58th combination in the cycle, preceded by {{ill|KŇćshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|ja|ŚļöÁĒ≥|1=KŇćshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=ŚļöÁĒ≥|4=zh|5=ŚļöÁĒ≥|6=ko|7=Í≤Ĺžč†|lt_ko=Í≤Ĺžč†|8=fr|9=Singe de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|zh|ŚļöÁĒ≥|1=KŇćshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=ŚļöÁĒ≥|4=zh|5=ŚļöÁĒ≥|6=ko|7=Í≤Ĺžč†|lt_ko=Í≤Ĺžč†|8=fr|9=Singe de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|ko|Í≤Ĺžč†|fr|Singe de m√©tal|de|Metall-Affe|en|lt_ko=Í≤Ĺžč†|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/KŇćshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/KŇćshin|13=User:Immanuelle/KŇćshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, and followed by {{ill|Yang Water Dog|ja|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|Ś£¨śąĆ|zh|1=Yang Water Dog|2=ja|Ś£¨śąĆ|ko|žěĄžą†|fr|Chien de eau|de|Wasser-Hund|en|lt_ko=žěĄžą†|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Water Dog|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|ja|ťôįťôĹšļĒŤ°ĆśÄĚśÉ≥|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Five Elements theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stem|1=Heavenly Stems}} {{ill|Mizunoto (Áôł)|cdo|GŇ≠i (tińēng-gńÉng)|fr|Gui (tige c√©leste)|gan|Áôł|1=Mizunoto (Áôł)|lt=Mizunoto (Áôł)|2=ja|3=Áôł|4=zh|5=Áôł|hak|Kui (thi√™n-k√īn)|ja|Mizunoto|ko|Í≥Ą (ž≤úÍįĄ)|vi|Qu√Ĺ (Thi√™n can)|wuu|Áôł|1=Mizunoto (Áôł)|lt=Mizunoto (Áôł)|2=ja|3=Áôł|4=zh|5=Áôł|za|Gveiq (diengan)|zh-min-nan|K√ļi (Thian-kan)|zh-yue|Áôł|1=Mizunoto (Áôł)|lt=Mizunoto (Áôł)|2=ja|3=Áôł|4=zh|5=Áôł|zh|Áôł|1=Mizunoto (Áôł)|lt=Mizunoto (Áôł)|2=ja|3=Áôł|4=zh|5=Áôł|lt=Mizunoto (Áôł)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (Áôł)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (Áôł)|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (Áôł)|qq=}} represents yin {{ill|metal|ja|Metal (ťáĎ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (ťáĎ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (ťáĎ)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgŇ© h√†nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=–ú–Ķ—ā–į–Ľ (–£-—Ā—Ė–Ĺ)|lt=Metal (ťáĎ)|lt=Metal (ťáĎ)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgŇ© h√†nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=–ú–Ķ—ā–į–Ľ (–£-—Ā—Ė–Ĺ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (ťáĎ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (ťáĎ)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgŇ© h√†nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=–ú–Ķ—ā–į–Ľ (–£-—Ā—Ė–Ĺ)|lt=Metal (ťáĎ)|lt=Metal (ťáĎ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (ťáĎ)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (ťáĎ)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (NgŇ© h√†nh)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=–ú–Ķ—ā–į–Ľ (–£-—Ā—Ė–Ĺ)|lt=Metal (ťáĎ)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branch|1=Earthly Branches}} {{ill|Rooster (zodiac)|en|Rooster (zodiac)|qid=Q822621|lt=Rooster (ťõě)|1=Rooster (zodiac)}} also represents yin metal, forming a {{ill|harmonious relationship|ja|śĮĒŚíĆ|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|2=ja|3=šļĒŤ°ĆśÄĚśÉ≥#śĮĒŚíĆÔľą„Ā≤„āŹÔľČ|1=śĮĒŚíĆ|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (śĮĒŚíĆ)|2=ja|3=šļĒŤ°ĆśÄĚśÉ≥#śĮĒŚíĆÔľą„Ā≤„āŹÔľČ|lt=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|qq=Harmonious Relationship (Five Elements)|4=el|5=őüŌÖ ő£őĻőĹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/harmonious relationship|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (śĮĒŚíĆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/harmonious relationship|13=User:Immanuelle/Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)#Harmonious Relationship (śĮĒŚíĆ)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}.

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yin Metal Rooster (ŤĺõťÖČ)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): xńęny«íu
** Cantonese (Jyutping): san1 jau5
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoto-tori
***Kunyomi 2: Shinkin-no-tori
***Onyomi 1: shinyuu
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): sinyu (žč†žú†)
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViŠĽát): T√Ęn DŠļ≠u

==Years of Yin Metal Rooster==
{{Anchors|Xinyou Year|qq=}}
A {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year that leaves a remainder of 1 when divided by 60 is a '''Yin Metal Rooster year'''.

Yin Metal Rooster is considered to have revolutionary significance.

In the ancient Chinese texts known as {{ill|Wei Shu|ja|Á∑Įśõł|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wei Shu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wei Shu|1=weishu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q24890026}} (banned by Emperor {{ill|Emperor Yang of Sui|en|Emperor Yang of Sui|qid=Q7419|lt=Yang of Sui|1=Emperor Yang of Sui}}), with surviving fragments found in {{ill|Miyoshi Kiyotsura|en|Miyoshi Kiyotsura|qid=Q2399435|lt=Miyoshi Kiyoyuki|1=Miyoshi Kiyotsura}}‚Äôs ‚Äú{{ill|Kakumei Kanbun|ja|ťĚ©ŚĎĹŚčėśĖá|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakumei Kanbun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakumei Kanbun|1=kakumei kanmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11663819}}‚ÄĚ (collected in ''{{ill|Gunsho RuijŇę|en|Gunsho RuijŇę|qid=Q1554852|lt=Gunsho RuijŇę|1=Gunsho RuijŇę}}'' vol. 26), it is written that following {{ill|KŇćshin|ja|ŚļöÁĒ≥|1=KŇćshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=ŚļöÁĒ≥|4=zh|5=ŚļöÁĒ≥|6=ko|7=Í≤Ĺžč†|lt_ko=Í≤Ĺžč†|8=fr|9=Singe de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/KŇćshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/KŇćshin|13=User:Immanuelle/KŇćshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}, Yin Metal Rooster also embodies the metal element, and Xin represents yin energy, often associated with people becoming cold-hearted. Thus, a Yin Metal Rooster year is considered a year when the {{ill|Mandate of Heaven|en|Mandate of Heaven|qid=Q875377|lt=Mandate of Heaven|1=Mandate of Heaven}} changes, marking revolutionary shifts in {{ill|Dynasty|en|Dynasty|qid=Q164950|lt=dynasties|1=Dynasty}}, known as the '''{{ill|Xinyou Revolution|ja|ŤĺõťÖČťĚ©ŚĎĹ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou Revolution|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou Revolution|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ŤĺõťÖČ|1=Yin Metal Rooster|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q904743}}'''.

In Japan, era name changes ({{ill|Era name|ja|śĒĻŚÖÉ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era name|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Era name|1=era change|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11498853}}) during Yin Metal Rooster years were meant to prevent political upheaval. This practice started in Yin Metal Rooster of {{ill|901|en|901|qid=Q23580|lt=901|1=901}} ({{ill|ShŇćtai|en|ShŇćtai|qid=Q1324780|lt=ShŇćtai|1=ShŇćtai}} 4), when scholar-official Miyoshi Kiyoyuki proposed changing the era name to '''{{ill|Engi (era)|en|Engi (era)|qid=Q1374325|lt=Engi|1=Engi (era)}}'''. Frequently, era names were changed consecutively in both {{ill|KŇćshin|ja|ŚļöÁĒ≥|1=KŇćshin|lt=Yang Metal Monkey|2=ja|3=ŚļöÁĒ≥|4=zh|5=ŚļöÁĒ≥|6=ko|7=Í≤Ĺžč†|lt_ko=Í≤Ĺžč†|8=fr|9=Singe de m√©tal|10=de|11=Metall-Affe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/KŇćshin|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/KŇćshin|13=User:Immanuelle/KŇćshin|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} and Yin Metal Rooster years, a custom that continued until the {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji period|1=Meiji era}}, though such a precedent does not exist in China.

{{Anchors|Xinyou Revolution|qq=}}
During the Meiji era, scholar {{ill|Naka Michiyo|ja|ťā£ÁŹāťÄöšłĖ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naka Michiyo|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Naka Michiyo|1=Naka Michiyo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11642793}} referenced ''Kakumei Kanbun'' with {{ill|Zheng Xuan|en|Zheng Xuan|qid=Q197649|lt=Zheng Xuan|1=Zheng Xuan}}‚Äôs annotation: 
* ‚ÄúThe way of Heaven is not distant; after every three and five, it returns. Six cycles ({{ill|Wood Rat|en|Wood Rat|qid=Q1190890|lt=Yang Wood Rat|1=Yang Wood Rat}}) form one era, four sixes and two sixes overlap, and three sevens multiply to form 21 cycles, totaling 1,320 years.‚ÄĚ
Based on this, it was believed that every '''1,260 years''' (21 cycles √ó 60 years = 1,260, called ''Ichibu'') there would be a major revolution during a Yin Metal Rooster year. Applying this, Naka theorized that the 9th year of {{ill|Empress Suiko|en|Empress Suiko|qid=Q298057|lt=Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko}}‚Äôs reign ({{ill|601|en|601|qid=Q30597|lt=601|1=601}}) marked such a revolutionary year, suggesting that Emperor {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|qid=Q200188|lt=Jimmu|1=Emperor Jimmu}}‚Äôs enthronement occurred 1,260 years earlier, in {{ill|660 BC|en|660 BC|qid=Q1059526|lt=660 BC|1=660 BC}}.

Alternatively, some interpret the annotation as indicating a '''1,320-year cycle''' (60 √ó 22 = 1,320). In this case, the pivotal year would shift to the year of the {{ill|Wood Rat|en|Wood Rat|qid=Q1190890|lt=Yang Wood Rat|1=Yang Wood Rat}}, three years after Yin Metal Rooster, considered the '''Jiazi Reform Year''' ({{ill|Jiazi Reform|ja|ÁĒ≤Ś≠źťĚ©šĽ§|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiazi Reform|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jiazi Reform|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ÁĒ≤Ś≠ź|1=Yang Wood Rat|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1190890}}). This places the starting point at {{ill|664|en|664|qid=Q30621|lt=664|1=664}} AD, the year after the {{ill|Battle of Baekgang|en|Battle of Baekgang|qid=Q608727|lt=Battle of Baekgang|1=Battle of Baekgang}}, aligning with the legendary founding date of 660 BC.

==Months of Yin Metal Rooster==
A '''Yin Metal Rooster month''' occurs in {{ill|August|en|August|qid=Q122|lt=August|1=August}} of years ending in 3 or 8 (corresponding to Heavenly Stems {{ill|Gui|ja|Áôł|1=Mizunoto (Áôł)|lt=Mizunoto (Áôł)|2=ja|3=Áôł|4=zh|5=Áôł|1=Mizunoto (Áôł)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (Áôł)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Gui|13=User:Immanuelle/Mizunoto (Áôł)|qq=}} and {{ill|Wu|ja|śąä|1=Tsuchinoe (śąä)|lt=Tsuchinoe (śąä)|2=ja|3=śąä|4=zh|5=śąä|1=Tsuchinoe (śąä)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (śąä)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (śąä)|qq=}}). Depending on the calendar system, this could refer to the {{ill|lunar calendar|ja|śóßśö¶|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/lunar calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} month or the solar term period between {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|qid=Q1191003|lt=White Dew|1=Bailu (solar term)}} and the day before {{ill|Hanlu|en|Hanlu|qid=Q1193124|lt=Cold Dew|1=Hanlu}}.

A '''Yin Metal Rooster day''' is the 7th day in the {{ill|Hassen|ja|ŚÖęŚįā|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hassen|qq=}} sequence, excluding intercalary days.

{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yin Metal Rooster Years'''
|-
!{{ill|1st millennium BC|en|1st millennium BC|qid=Q25716|lt=1st millennium BC|1=1st millennium BC}}!!{{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st millennium AD|1=1st millennium}}!!{{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd millennium AD|1=2nd millennium}}!!{{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd millennium AD|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
*{{ill|960 BC|ja|ÁīÄŚÖÉŚČć960ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/960 BC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/960 BC|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ÁīÄŚÖÉŚČć10šłĖÁīÄ|1=10th century BC|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q25425}}
*{{ill|900 BC|ja|ÁīÄŚÖÉŚČć900ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/900 BC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/900 BC|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to ÁīÄŚÖÉŚČć9šłĖÁīÄ|1=9th century BC|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q25424}}
*{{ill|840 BC|ja|ÁīÄŚÖÉŚČć840ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/840 BC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/840 BC|1=840 BC|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1450311}}
*{{ill|780 BC|ja|ÁīÄŚÖÉŚČć780ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/780 BC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/780 BC|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=780 BC|qid=Q1059191}}
*{{ill|720 BC|ja|ÁīÄŚÖÉŚČć720ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/720 BC|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/720 BC|comment=changed title based on wikidata|1=720 BC|qid=Q1057404}}
*{{ill|660 BC|en|660 BC|qid=Q1059526|lt=660 BC|1=660 BC}}
*{{ill|600 BC|en|600 BC|qid=Q246827|lt=600 BC|1=600 BC}}
*{{ill|540 BC|en|540 BC|qid=Q243305|lt=540 BC|1=540 BC}}
*{{ill|480 BC|en|480 BC|qid=Q43241|lt=480 BC|1=480 BC}}
*{{ill|420 BC|en|420 BC|qid=Q233151|lt=420 BC|1=420 BC}}
*{{ill|360 BC|en|360 BC|qid=Q75637|lt=360 BC|1=360 BC}}
*{{ill|300 BC|en|300 BC|qid=Q47353|lt=300 BC|1=300 BC}}
*{{ill|240 BC|en|240 BC|qid=Q35557|lt=240 BC|1=240 BC}}
*{{ill|180 BC|en|180 BC|qid=Q45891|lt=180 BC|1=180 BC}}
*{{ill|120 BC|en|120 BC|qid=Q44114|lt=120 BC|1=120 BC}}
*{{ill|60 BC|en|60 BC|qid=Q41527|lt=60 BC|1=60 BC}}
|
*{{ill|1|en|1|qid=Q199|lt=1|1=1}}
*{{ill|AD 61|en|AD 61|qid=Q23862|lt=61|1=AD 61}}
*{{ill|AD 121|en|AD 121|qid=Q30939|lt=121|1=AD 121}}
*{{ill|181|en|181|qid=Q31368|lt=181|1=181}}
*{{ill|241|en|241|qid=Q32065|lt=241|1=241}}
*{{ill|301|en|301|qid=Q24654|lt=301|1=301}}
*{{ill|361|en|361|qid=Q47953|lt=361|1=361}}
*{{ill|421|en|421|qid=Q33562|lt=421|1=421}}
*{{ill|481|en|481|qid=Q30284|lt=481|1=481}}
*{{ill|541|en|541|qid=Q30870|lt=541|1=541}}
*{{ill|601|en|601|qid=Q30597|lt=601|1=601}}
*{{ill|661|en|661|qid=Q30084|lt=661|1=661}}
*{{ill|721|en|721|qid=Q23541|lt=721|1=721}}
*{{ill|781|en|781|qid=Q31175|lt=781|1=781}}
*{{ill|841|en|841|qid=Q24870|lt=841|1=841}}
*{{ill|901|en|901|qid=Q23580|lt=901|1=901}}
*{{ill|961|en|961|qid=Q23881|lt=961|1=961}}
|
*{{ill|1021|en|1021|qid=Q19257|lt=1021|1=1021}}
*{{ill|1081|en|1081|qid=Q19450|lt=1081|1=1081}}
*{{ill|1141|en|1141|qid=Q19613|lt=1141|1=1141}}
*{{ill|1201|en|1201|qid=Q5225|lt=1201|1=1201}}
*{{ill|1261|en|1261|qid=Q5509|lt=1261|1=1261}}
*{{ill|1321|en|1321|qid=Q5769|lt=1321|1=1321}}
*{{ill|1381|en|1381|qid=Q6331|lt=1381|1=1381}}
*{{ill|1441|en|1441|qid=Q6402|lt=1441|1=1441}}
*{{ill|1501|en|1501|qid=Q6131|lt=1501|1=1501}}
*{{ill|1561|en|1561|qid=Q6618|lt=1561|1=1561}}
*{{ill|1621|en|1621|qid=Q6812|lt=1621|1=1621}}
*{{ill|1681|en|1681|qid=Q7645|lt=1681|1=1681}}
*{{ill|1741|en|1741|qid=Q7573|lt=1741|1=1741}}
*{{ill|1801|en|1801|qid=Q6877|lt=1801|1=1801}}
*{{ill|1861|en|1861|qid=Q7693|lt=1861|1=1861}}
*{{ill|1921|en|1921|qid=Q2162|lt=1921|1=1921}}
*{{ill|1981|en|1981|qid=Q2437|lt=1981|1=1981}}
|
*{{ill|2041|en|2041|qid=Q49914|lt=2041|1=2041}}
*{{ill|2101|en|2101|qid=Q11036264|lt=2101|1=2101}}
*[[:en:2161|2161]]
*{{ill|2221|en|2221|qid=Q28913545|lt=2221|1=2221}}
*[[:en:2281|2281]]
*[[:en:2341|2341]]
*{{ill|2401|en|2401|qid=Q27207302|lt=2401|1=2401}}
*[[:en:2461|2461]]
*{{ill|2521|ja|2521ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2521|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2521|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
*{{ill|2581|ja|2581ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2581|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2581|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
*{{ill|2641|ja|2641ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2641|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2641|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
*{{ill|2701|en|2701|qid=Q97236494|lt=2701|1=2701}}
*{{ill|2761|ja|2761ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2761|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2761|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
*{{ill|2821|ja|2821ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2821|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2821|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
*{{ill|2881|ja|2881ŚĻī|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2881|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2881|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
*[[:en:2941|2941]]
|}

==Days of Yin Metal Rooster==
* {{Cite book|language=ja |title={{ill|Kakumei Kanbun|ja|ťĚ©ŚĎĹŚčėśĖá|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakumei Kanbun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakumei Kanbun|1=kakumei kanmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11663819}}: Written by {{ill|Miyoshi no Sukune Kiyoyuki|ja|šłČŚĖĄŚģŅÁ¶įśłÖŤ°Ć|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyoshi no Sukune Kiyoyuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Miyoshi no Sukune Kiyoyuki|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} |publisher={{ill|Keizai Zasshisha|ja|ÁĶĆśłąťõĎŤ™ĆÁ§ĺ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keizai Zasshisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Keizai Zasshisha|1=Keizai Zasshisha|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11606486}} |pages=906‚Äď911 |series={{ill|Gunsho RuijŇę|en|Gunsho RuijŇę|qid=Q1554852|lt=Gunsho RuijŇę|1=Gunsho RuijŇę}}, Vol. 17 |editor={{ill|Hanawa Hokiichi|en|Hanawa Hokiichi|qid=Q6537362|lt=Hanawa Hokiichi|1=Hanawa Hokiichi}} |url=https://dl.ndl.go.jp/pid/1879818/1/458|qq=}}

==See Also==
* {{ill|Kakumei Kanbun|ja|ťĚ©ŚĎĹŚčėśĖá|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakumei Kanbun|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kakumei Kanbun|1=kakumei kanmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11663819}}
* {{ill|Emperor Jimmu|en|Emperor Jimmu|qid=Q200188|lt=Emperor Jimmu|1=Emperor Jimmu}}
* {{ill|Nihon Shoki|en|Nihon Shoki|qid=Q813935|lt=Nihon Shoki|1=Nihon Shoki}}
* {{ill|Tsukamoto Meiki|ja|Ś°öśú¨śėéśĮÖ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukamoto Meiki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsukamoto Meiki|1=Akitake Tsukamoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q3607355}}‚Äôs ''{{ill|Sansei SŇćran|ja|šłČś≠£Á∂úŤ¶ß|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sansei SŇćran|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sansei SŇćran|1=Q11356063|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11356063}}''

==External Links==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20110410225801/http://www004.upp.so-net.ne.jp/dassai1/kakumeikannbunn/gen.htm ''Kakumei Kanbun'' from ''Gunsho RuijŇę'', Vol. 26]

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yin Metal Rooster|qq=ja|ŤĺõťÖČ|version=103101214|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q904743|af|Metaalhaan (astrologie)|cdo|Sń≠ng-iŇę|de|Metall-Hahn|hak|S√ģn-y√Ľ|ja|ŤĺõťÖČ|ko|žč†žú†|vi|T√Ęn DŠļ≠u|za|Sinyoux|zh-min-nan|Sin-i√ļ|zh-yue|ŤĺõťÖČ|zh|ŤĺõťÖČ|zh-min-nan|ń™t-ch√ļ|zh-yue|šĻôśú™|cdo|√Čk-cŠĻ≥ŐĄde|nds|Holt-Ziegenevi|de|Yin Metal Rooster|fr|Coq de m√©tal|af|Houtbok (astrologie)|de|Holz-Ziegeneen|en|Wood Goat|fr|Ch√®vre de boisboishak|it|Yit-chŠĻ≥ŐĀid|ko|žĚĄŽĮł|vi|Šļ§t M√Ļi|za|Yitceij|zh|šĻôśú™|ar|Yin Metal Rooster}}
[[Category:Chinese astrology]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
